generated_oml:

prefix base = "http://www.example.org/base"

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with six axes, focusing on first axis for precise motion control and dynamics analysis",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment ManufacturingEnvironment
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manufacturing environment for MABI MAX 100 industrial robot operations"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational status of robot axes"
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction levels in robot joints for maintenance analysis"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance scheduling"
]

    base:desc "Visual representation of robot operational data and simulation results"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of operational parameters for industrial robot",

]

instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance DynamicSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization dashboard interface for manufacturing engineers and maintenance teams",
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, JointFrictionIdentificationService, DynamicSimulationService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology for multi-level abstraction modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, JointFrictionIdentificationService, DynamicSimulationService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology for multi-level abstraction modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, JointFrictionIdentificationService, DynamicSimulationService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology for multi-level abstraction modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, JointFrictionIdentificationService, DynamicSimulationService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, JointFrictionIdentificationService

]

    base:desc "Sensor measuring joint friction in industrial robot axes",

]

instance JointFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance JointFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML [17] for model-based systems engineering, AADL [24] for architecture description, ACME [23] for component-based modeling, MontiArc [25], [26] for architectural descriptions, and SysML IBDs [17], [27] for interface and behavior modeling.
